content.json:
# KAIF Paper Figures Workbook
This workbook is a publication-focused subset (10 charts) for methods/results reporting.

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, ok=Success
| where ts > ago(7d)
| summarize requests=count(), success_rate=100.0*countif(ok==true)/count() by bin(ts, 15m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: A1 Request Volume and Success Rate

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, dur_ms=todouble(DurationMs)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| summarize p50=percentile(dur_ms,50), p95=percentile(dur_ms,95), p99=percentile(dur_ms,99) by bin(ts, 15m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: A2 End-to-End Latency (p50/p95/p99)

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, code=tostring(ResultCode)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend bucket=case(code == '429','429', code startswith '4','4xx', code startswith '5','5xx', 'other')
| summarize failures=count() by bin(ts, 15m), bucket
| order by ts asc
content.title: A3 Error Distribution (4xx/5xx/429)

content.json: ## Figure Set B: Foundry Agent Performance and Cost

content.query:
AppDependencies
| project ts=TimeGenerated, tgt=tostring(Target), ok=Success, props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| where tgt has 'services.ai.azure.com' or tostring(props.component) == 'foundry'
| summarize calls=count(), success_rate=100.0*countif(ok==true)/count() by bin(ts, 15m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: B1 Foundry Calls and Success Rate

content.query:
AppDependencies
| project ts=TimeGenerated, tgt=tostring(Target), dur_ms=todouble(DurationMs), props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| where tgt has 'services.ai.azure.com' or tostring(props.component) == 'foundry'
| summarize p50=percentile(dur_ms,50), p95=percentile(dur_ms,95), p99=percentile(dur_ms,99) by bin(ts, 15m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: B2 Foundry Latency (p50/p95/p99)

content.query:
AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend prompt_tokens=todouble(props.prompt_tokens), completion_tokens=todouble(props.completion_tokens), total_tokens=todouble(props.total_tokens)
| where isnotnull(total_tokens) or isnotnull(prompt_tokens) or isnotnull(completion_tokens)
| summarize prompt_tokens=sum(coalesce(prompt_tokens, 0.0)), completion_tokens=sum(coalesce(completion_tokens, 0.0)), total_tokens=sum(coalesce(total_tokens, 0.0)) by bin(ts, 30m)
| extend est_cost_usd = total_tokens * 0.000001
| order by ts asc
content.title: B3 Token Volume and Estimated Cost

content.json: ## Figure Set C: Redis Resource Behavior

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.CACHE'
| where MetricName in ('cachehits','cachemisses')
| summarize v=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), MetricName
| evaluate pivot(MetricName, sum(v))
| extend hit_ratio = todouble(cachehits) / (todouble(cachehits) + todouble(cachemisses))
| project TimeGenerated, hit_ratio
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: C1 Redis Cache Hit Ratio

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.CACHE'
| where MetricName in ('evictedkeys','connectedclients','usedmemory')
| summarize avg_value=avg(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), MetricName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: C2 Redis Evictions, Clients, Memory

content.json: ## Figure Set D: Governance and Workflow Integrity

content.query:
let src = AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties), msg=tostring(Message)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend event_type = iff(isnotempty(tostring(props.event_type)), tostring(props.event_type), case(
    msg has '"event_type":"dns.node.pause"', 'dns.node.pause',
    msg has '"event_type":"dns.node.resume"', 'dns.node.resume',
    ''
));
let pauses = src
| where event_type == 'dns.node.pause'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), ts=ts;
let resumes = src
| where event_type == 'dns.node.resume'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), resume_ts=ts;
pauses
| join kind=leftouter resumes on run_id
| summarize paused=count(), resumed=countif(isnotempty(resume_ts)) by bin(ts, 1h)
| extend resume_rate = 100.0 * resumed / paused
| order by ts asc
content.title: D1 Pause to Resume Success Rate

content.query:
let src = AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties), msg=tostring(Message)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend event_type = iff(isnotempty(tostring(props.event_type)), tostring(props.event_type), case(
    msg has '"event_type":"workflow.run.start"', 'workflow.run.start',
    msg has '"event_type":"workflow.run.finish"', 'workflow.run.finish',
    ''
));
let starts = src
| where event_type == 'workflow.run.start'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), start_ts=ts;
let finishes = src
| where event_type == 'workflow.run.finish'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), finish_ts=ts;
starts
| join kind=inner finishes on run_id
| extend runtime_ms = datetime_diff('millisecond', finish_ts, start_ts)
| summarize p50=percentile(runtime_ms,50), p95=percentile(runtime_ms,95), p99=percentile(runtime_ms,99) by bin(start_ts, 1h)
| order by start_ts asc
content.title: D2 End to End Workflow Runtime
